title: GATE Memory Item
description: Stored item in a governed memory store. v1.3 introduces required quality metadata (content_class, provenance_uri, provenance_hash, confidence_score, created_at) consumed by the C18 Data Quality Gate at retrieval time.

item_id.description: Stable identifier for this item within its memory store.

content_class.description: Required taxonomy key (e.g. legal_text, product_pricing, internal_policy, public_reference). Drives the per-class quality bundle configuration. Memory Gateway rejects writes that omit content_class.

provenance_uri.description: Resolvable external reference to the source. HTTP(S) URI, signed source identifier, or registered upstream pipeline identity. Self-referential URIs fail validation.

provenance_hash.description: Hash of the source descriptor resolved from provenance_uri at write time. Verified by C18 at retrieval time.

confidence_score.description: Confidence captured at write time. Semantics defined by the upstream pipeline. C18 enforces the per-class minimum; it does not compute the score.

metadata.description: Store-specific metadata not covered by the standard fields above.

embedding_ref.description: Pointer to the embedding vector(s) for this item, if applicable.
